<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\Types; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Type; /** * Value Object representing the return-type 'never'. * * Never is generally only used when working with return types as it signifies that the method that only * ever throw or exit. * * @psalm-immutable */ final class Never_ implements Type { /** * Returns a rendered output of the Type as it would be used in a DocBlock. */ public function __toString(): string { return 'never'; } }
